title: Notice of Bally Crescent closure on Louis Fourie Road
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that access from Louis Fourie Road to Bally Crescent will be closed for construction work from 6 October until 27 October 2025 (weather permitting).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that access from Louis Fourie Road to Bally Crescent will be closed for construction work from 6 October until 27 October 2025 (weather permitting)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Alternative access via Watson Street and Bolton Road."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience during construction.","html":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience during construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, for you.","html":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, for you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
